data.body: STATUS (handoff): OPEN, NOT yet claimed/implemented. Plan REMEDIATED through 5 review rounds and the description now fully specifies the design (two-lane tier-tagged impact_code; CodeSeverityAttrs; trigger_likelihood NOT likelihood [avoids base-field collision]; reversibility_floor gated on impact_base>0 with concrete path-pattern surface detection; 3-part verify wiring). CRITICAL: this child references impact_fn from sibling fishable-apivorous-redhead (stack commit 29d9fa863) which is NOT on origin/main, so its plan-review MUST be run grounded against the stack: REBAR_GATE_REF=<stack tip 23581b171> rebar review-plan albite-lazy-barb (default origin/main grounding falsely reports impact_fn absent). Last review (round 5, stack-grounded) was down to advisory-only-or-near-pass; a round-5 result may be in job tmp rp_codeimpact5.txt. Impl plan: verify.py code_review_verification_model via shared _build_verification_output; decide.impact_code; code_review/contracts.py register code_review_verification; code-review.yaml verify output_schema + code-review-verify.md outputs: front-matter -> code_review_verification; code_review_decide DET-enriches attrs (churn via git, reversibility surface via paths) + passes impact_fn=impact_code; fixture tests/unit/fixtures/code_review_impact_labels.jsonl; test_impact_code.py; ADR under docs/adr/.
